title: Reading the Bass Clef
description: Learn the letter names of the lines and spaces for the Bass Clef (F Clef).

sessions.title: Bass Clef: Line Notes
sessions.description: Learn the notes on the five lines of the Bass Clef: G2, B2, D3, F3, A3.
sessions.prompt: Teach the notes on the lines of the Bass Clef: G, B, D, F, A. Use common mnemonics as examples but focus on the visual position. Provide interactive exercises that present these line notes randomly and ask the user to play them.

sessions.title: Bass Clef: Space Notes
sessions.description: Learn the notes in the four spaces of the Bass Clef: A2, C3, E3, G3.
sessions.prompt: Teach the notes in the spaces of the Bass Clef: A, C, E, G. Mention mnemonics like 'All Cows Eat Grass' as an English-specific example, but emphasize the intervals. Provide interactive exercises that present space notes randomly for the user to play.

sessions.title: Bass Clef Review
sessions.description: Consolidate your knowledge of the whole Bass Clef range.
sessions.prompt: Combine Bass Clef line and space notes. Provide exercises with melodic fragments spanning from G2 to A3. Focus on step-wise motion and small skips.
